mapper.select:
SELECT r.*, p.real_name, p.gender, p.birthdate, p.case_number, d.dept_name FROM register r JOIN patient p ON r.patient_id = p.id JOIN department d ON r.deptment_id = d.id WHERE r.employee_id = #{doctorId} AND r.visit_date = COALESCE(#{visitDate}, CURRENT_DATE) AND ( r.visit_state = #{visitState} OR (#{visitState} = 'REGISTERED' AND r.visit_state = 'CHECKED_IN') )
AND ( r.noon = #{noon} OR (#{noon} = 'MORNING' AND r.noon = 'AM') OR (#{noon} = 'AFTERNOON' AND r.noon = 'PM') OR (#{noon} = 'AM' AND r.noon = 'MORNING') OR (#{noon} = 'PM' AND r.noon = 'AFTERNOON') )
ORDER BY r.queue_no ASC, r.create_time DESC

SELECT r.*, p.real_name, p.gender, p.birthdate, p.case_number, d.dept_name, e.realname as doctor_name, rl.regist_name, mr.diagnosis, mr.record_status FROM register r JOIN patient p ON r.patient_id = p.id JOIN department d ON r.deptment_id = d.id JOIN employee e ON r.employee_id = e.id JOIN regist_level rl ON r.regist_level_id = rl.id LEFT JOIN medical_record mr ON r.id = mr.register_id WHERE r.patient_id = #{patientId} AND r.visit_date = #{visitDate} AND COALESCE(r.visit_state, '') NOT IN ('REFUNDED', 'CANCELLED', 'FINISHED') ORDER BY r.queue_no ASC, r.create_time DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT r.*, p.real_name, p.gender, p.birthdate, p.case_number, p.phone, p.home_address, d.dept_name, e.realname as doctor_name, rl.regist_name, mr.readme, mr.present, mr.diagnosis, mr.record_status, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM check_request WHERE register_id = r.id) as check_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM inspection_request WHERE register_id = r.id) as inspection_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM prescription WHERE register_id = r.id) as prescription_count FROM register r JOIN patient p ON r.patient_id = p.id JOIN department d ON r.deptment_id = d.id JOIN employee e ON r.employee_id = e.id JOIN regist_level rl ON r.regist_level_id = rl.id LEFT JOIN medical_record mr ON r.id = mr.register_id WHERE r.id = #{registerId}
mapper.update: UPDATE register SET visit_state = 'REFUNDED' WHERE id = #{id}
